---
title: "Articles"
subtitle: "Statistical methods, bioinformatics algorithms, and computational biology — written for scientists who want both intuition and rigor."
listing:
  contents:
    - "em-algorithm/*.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 1
  categories: false
  fields: [image, title, description, date, reading-time, categories]
  feed: true
page-layout: article
toc: false
number-sections: false
---
